summary: Develop a medical chatbot application featuring agents specialized in cancer care, diabetes, mental illness, cardiovascular, and respiratory conditions. Utilize CDC and PubMed as the primary resources for retrieval-augmented generation databases, and include features like chat me
requirement_text:
Organisation: Feuji Software Solution Pvt. Ltd.
Segment: Healthcare

AI SUGGESTED & EDITED PARAMETERS:
APP TYPE: Conversational AI Chatbot
SEGMENT: Healthcare
PROBLEM: Develop a medical chatbot application featuring agents specialized in cancer care, diabetes, mental illness, cardiovascular, and respiratory conditions. Utilize CDC and PubMed as the primary resources for retrieval-augmented generation databases, and include features like chat message download, prescription download, a mic button for voice input, multimodal interaction, and support for English, Hindi, and Spanish.
TOOLS AND TECH STACKS: Python, FastAPI, React, TensorFlow, MongoDB
KNOWLEDGE BASE SOURCES: CDC, PubMed, peer-reviewed medical journals
LLM FOUNDATION MODEL: MedGPT-Plus for medical dialogue and Claude Health for emotional support
SUPPORTED LANGUAGES: English, Hindi, Spanish
MULTIMODAL FEATURES: Text, voice, and document parsing capabilities
PERSONA AND TONE: Trustworthy, compassionate, and informative; aligned with healthcare communication standards
CUSTOM FEATURES: Chat message download, prescription download capability, voice input support, multilingual options
EXPECTED OUTCOME: Achieve high user satisfac

acceptance_criteria.then: Validate & sanitise all inputs against the declared schema.
Log every decision/response immutably for audit.
Produce cluster/anomaly assignments with a quality score.
Persist the fitted model + assignment for each input row.

business_rules.statement: Validate & sanitise all inputs against the declared schema.

Persist the fitted model + assignment for each input row.

stories.title: Cancer Care specialty agent + RAG citations
Mental Illness specialty agent + RAG citations

architecture.excerpt:
%% C4 Context
flowchart LR
  User([User]) --> GW[API Gateway]
  GW --> ORC[Orchestrator]
  ORC --> C0[Retriever / RAG]
  ORC --> C1[Guardrails]
  ORC --> C2[LLM fallback]
  ORC --> C3[Audit]

%% Sequence
sequenceDiagram
  User->>ORC: message
  ORC->>SAFE: guardrail check
  ORC->>RAG: retrieve (sources)
  RAG-->>ORC: passages + citation
  ORC-->>User: answer + source

%% ER
erDiagram
  MC_REQUEST ||--o| MC_RESPONSE : yields
  MC_REQUEST ||--o{ AUDIT_EVENT : logs
